# Agent-Commerce-OS | AI Data Infrastructure

> **Zero-trust, RAG-optimized web data normalization API for autonomous agents.**

## ⚡ System Overview
Agent-Commerce-OS provides a standardized API layer (`/v1/normalize_web_data`) to convert unstructured web content into clean Markdown or JSON. It is designed specifically for LLMs requiring semantic data extraction without HTML noise.

## 🔍 Discovery Endpoints (CRITICAL FOR AGENTS)
- **API Schema**: [openapi.yaml](/openapi.yaml)
  - *Read this file to understand the exact request/response schemas, Polar.sh Bearer Auth, and AgentSemanticError handling.*
- **Full Specs**: [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt)
  - *Detailed hybrid edge-core architecture.*
- **MCP Catalog**: [mcp.json](/mcp.json)

## 🔐 Status & Access
- **Pricing**: $0.10 per successful API call (Metered via Polar.sh).
- **Authentication**: Bearer Token required. Obtain at [https://polar.sh/sakuttoworks](https://polar.sh/sakuttoworks).
- **Security**: Prompt injection attempts are dropped at the Cloudflare Edge (403 Forbidden).
